details.reasoning: The implementation fully meets all rubric requirements. The new INIObject.zig file correctly implements create, parse, and stringify functions with proper JSGlobalObject/JSValue signatures. The parse function comprehensively handles INI sections ([section] headers with nested objects), key=value pairs with both = and : separators, dotted sections ([a.b] notation), comments (both ; and #), quoted values, CRLF line endings, and inline comments. Stringify properly emits top-level key=value pairs followed by [section] blocks with dot notation for nested objects. Integration is complete: BunObject.zig adds the lazy property callback, api.zig exports INIObject, BunObject+exports.h includes the macro entry, and BunObject.cpp includes the hash table entry. TypeScript definitions in bun.d.ts provide complete namespace documentation with examples. The parser is self-contained (no npm dependencies, only std and bun imports). Code follows Zig conventions throughout (jsc.JSFunction.create, ZigString.static, proper error handling). Comprehensive test suite validates parsing, stringifying, roundtrips, and edge cases. All structural and logical requirements satisfied.
